title: High stakes battle in Banka as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Banka. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Banka
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Banka assembly segment.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Banka triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Banka, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
